name: Memphis Vision Care Pvt. Ltd.
tagline: Sterile prefilled syringe manufacturing for critical care segments.
description: Memphis Vision Care is a focused sterile manufacturer producing prefilled syringe (PFS) presentations for ophthalmic, cardiac critical care, orthopaedic, and gynaecology segments — trusted by hospitals, distributors, and pharma partners worldwide.
address: Plot No. 450, Beside Jay Banas Metals Pvt. Ltd., Near Biscuit Factory, Opposite Nirma Factory, Chhatral, Gandhinagar, Gujarat 382729, India
mission: To deliver reliable sterile dosage forms that support safer handling, accurate dosing, and consistent quality for healthcare professionals worldwide.
vision: To become the trusted global partner for prefilled syringe manufacturing across ophthalmic, critical care, orthopaedic, and gynaecology segments.

differentiators.title: Sterile PFS specialism
differentiators.text: A focused operation built specifically around prefilled syringe science, not a diluted general-purpose facility.

differentiators.title: Quality without compromise
differentiators.text: WHO-GMP-aligned systems, validated processes, and a documented release discipline that audit teams can verify.

differentiators.title: Partner-grade documentation
differentiators.text: Dossiers, CoAs, stability data, and market-specific paperwork prepared to streamline registration in every territory.

differentiators.title: Trusted by exporters
differentiators.text: Active supply into 25+ countries with consistent delivery, traceability, and after-sales coordination.

leadership.name: Mr. Naresh Patel
leadership.title: Managing Director
leadership.bio: Over two decades in sterile pharmaceutical manufacturing and export operations.

leadership.name: Dr. Anita Rao
leadership.title: Director — Quality & Regulatory
leadership.bio: Leads QA/QC, validation, and regulatory dossier strategy across regulated and emerging markets.

leadership.name: Mr. Rajiv Mehta
leadership.title: Head of Operations
leadership.bio: Owns plant operations, equipment qualification, and aseptic process discipline.

leadership.name: Ms. Sneha Iyer
leadership.title: Head of Business Development
leadership.bio: Partners with distributors, hospital groups, and CDMO clients across 25+ countries.

timeline.title: Founded
timeline.text: Memphis Vision Care established with a sterile PFS specialism.

timeline.title: WHO-GMP alignment
timeline.text: Quality systems and facility upgraded to WHO-GMP guidelines.

timeline.title: First exports
timeline.text: International supply begins across East Africa and the Middle East.

timeline.title: Therapeutic expansion
timeline.text: Cardiac critical care and orthopaedic PFS lines added to the portfolio.

timeline.title: CDMO partnerships
timeline.text: Long-term contract manufacturing agreements signed with regional pharma brands.

timeline.title: 25-country footprint
timeline.text: Active supply across 25+ countries with growing institutional partnerships.
